meaning: n.碗,碗状物,木球v.滚,(板球)投球
examples: She served him a bowl of beef stew.
I have a bowl of cereal every morning.
The glass bowl smashed into a thousand pieces.
The hosts found the going difficult in bowler-friendly conditions, justifying Bangladesh's decision to bowl first.
To appease the pixies, Guernsey folk would leave a bowl of porridge out at night.
